heading: Separate maintenance allowance for duty at Johnston Island
label: 5942a Separate maintenance allowance for duty at Johnston Island

Delegation of FunctionsAuthority of President under this section to prescribe regulations delegated to the Office of Personnel Management by section 8(4) of Ex. Ord. No. 11609, set out as a note under , The President.section 301 of Title 3
amendments: Effective Date, , , provided that:Pub. L. 102–190, div. A, title X, § 1092(b)105 Stat. 1487Dec. 5, 1991“The amendments made by subsection (a) [enacting this section] shall take effect on the first day of the first month beginning on or after the date of the enactment of this Act [].”Dec. 5, 1991

children.label: A
children.text: by reason of dangerous or adverse living conditions at Johnston Island; or

children.label: B
children.text: for the convenience of the Federal Government; and
the allowance is needed to help the employee meet the additional expenses involved in maintaining the employee’s spouse or dependents, or both, at such other location rather than at the post.

children.label: b
children.text: The regulations prescribed by the President shall include provisions for determining the rate at which an allowance under this section shall be paid.
